name: Cryo Glow Ice Facial Roller
tagline: De-puff and tighten in two minutes, straight from your freezer
description: A silicone ice roller that turns plain water (or green tea, or aloe) into a spa-grade cryo facial. Glide it over cheeks, jawline and under-eyes in the morning to visibly reduce puffiness, calm redness and tighten the look of pores — before makeup or after a long day.
how_to_use: Fill with water, freeze overnight, and roll over clean skin in upward strokes for 1–2 minutes. Use every morning to de-puff, or after sun and workouts to cool and calm.
supplier_notes: Shop1102942067 Store · 65.96 SEK · 4.9★ · 4,000+ sold · free ship >100kr
why: Instant visible de-puffing - clear morning-routine transformation.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: Silk Dream Heatless Curling Set
tagline: Wake up to soft, bouncy curls — zero heat, zero damage
description: A satin heatless curling rod kit that gives you salon-soft waves while you sleep. Wrap damp hair around the padded rod, secure with the scrunchies, and wake up to bouncy, frizz-free curls — no heat damage, ever.
how_to_use: On damp (not wet) hair, part down the middle and wrap each side around the rod away from your face. Secure ends with the scrunchies, sleep, unwrap, and shake out. Finish with a drop of hair oil.
why: Heat-damage-free curls overnight - huge TikTok trend, clear transformation.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: Scalp Revival Massage Brush
tagline: Deep-clean your scalp, boost circulation, love your wash day
description: A soft-yet-firm silicone scalp brush that lifts away buildup, boosts circulation and turns every shampoo into a head massage. Healthier scalp, happier hair — and honestly, the most relaxing 60 seconds of your shower.
how_to_use: Work shampoo into wet hair, then massage the brush in slow circles across your whole scalp for about a minute. Use every wash; also great for distributing scalp treatments.
supplier_notes: AE-SM Store · 54.19 SEK · 4.7★ · 10,000+ sold · free ship >100kr
why: Scalp health trend, 10k+ sold, cheap to ship.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: Sculpt & Lift Gua Sha Stone
tagline: The jade sculpting ritual for a defined jawline and lifted glow
description: A genuine Xiuyan jade gua sha stone shaped to hug your jawline, cheekbones and neck. Used for a few minutes a day with your favorite oil or serum, it supports lymphatic drainage, eases tension, and leaves skin looking sculpted, rested and glowing.
how_to_use: Apply facial oil, then sweep the stone upward and outward along jaw, cheeks and neck with light pressure, 5–10 strokes per area. Use 3–5 times a week; keep it in the fridge for an extra de-puffing boost.
why: Face sculpting and lymphatic drainage - visible definition.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: Cryo Ice Globes Duo
tagline: The cold-therapy facial, bottled in glass
description: A pair of chilled glass ice globes that de-puff, calm redness and tighten pores in minutes. Keep them in the fridge and glide over skin as the final step of your morning routine — instantly awake, visibly snatched.
how_to_use: Chill in the fridge (not freezer) for 20+ minutes. Glide over face and neck in upward circles for 3–5 minutes after skincare. Clean with mild soap after use.
supplier_notes: Bling Butterfly Store · 65.44 SEK · 4.7★ · 4,000+ sold · set incl. gua sha
why: Instant de-puffing ritual; pairs perfectly with ice roller for bundles.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: Jade Ritual Roller + Gua Sha Set
tagline: The complete two-piece facial massage ritual
description: Our full jade ritual in one set: a dual-ended jade roller for daily massage and de-puffing, paired with a sculpting gua sha board for jawline and cheekbone definition. The perfect first step into facial massage — or the perfect gift.
how_to_use: Morning: roll from the centre of the face outward, large end for cheeks, small end under eyes. Evening: apply oil and sculpt with the gua sha board. Store in the fridge for a cooling ritual.
why: Complete ritual set - higher perceived value, giftable.
warnings: store age unknown - verify 2+ years manually

name: The Morning Ritual Set
tagline: Ice roller + gua sha: the 5-minute depuff-and-sculpt ritual
description: Our two bestselling face tools in one ritual. Start with the Cryo Glow ice roller to de-puff and wake up your skin, then sculpt jawline and cheekbones with the jade gua sha stone. The complete morning transformation — and a better price than buying separately.
how_to_use: Morning: roll the frozen ice roller over face and neck for 2 minutes. Evening (or after skincare): sweep the gua sha upward along jaw and cheekbones. Keep both in the fridge for maximum cooling.
supplier_notes: BUNDLE = 2 supplier orders: ice roller https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005010653334708.html (~$6.30) + gua sha https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005007170857376.html (~$6.85)
why: AOV booster: pairs the two hero face tools.

name: The Healthy Hair Ritual Set
tagline: Heatless curls by night, happy scalp by day
description: The complete hair-health ritual: sleep your way to soft, bouncy curls with the satin heatless curling set, and give your scalp a spa-grade deep clean with the massage brush on wash days. Zero heat damage, visibly healthier hair.
how_to_use: Wash day: massage shampoo in with the scalp brush for one minute. Before bed: wrap damp hair around the satin rod and sleep. Wake up, unwrap, shake out.
